description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish sandals from catwalk to brave the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and even leggings.UpperSynthetic leather upper with cutoutsReinforced overlay on the heel for ankle supportErgonomically designed footbed with mild padding for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heelBranding on the forefoot region of the outsole and floral grooves on the heelshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
